pr.title: Some ftparts.c decomp and various cleanup + naming
pr.author: AltimorTASDK

summary: Decompiled Fighter_JObjMakePositionMtx in src/melee/ft/ftparts.c, replaced anonymous BSS byte arrays with a named ft_jobj_scale structure, fixed HSD_JObjGetScaleZ to return scale.z instead of scale.x, and updated remaining assembly references to use the new symbol name. The PR also did cleanup around float constants and temporary inline scale getters needed to preserve assertion string behavior. Merge discussion noted overlap with PR #637 and rebasing/merge ordering concerns.
what_changed: Replaced the inline assembly implementation of Fighter_JObjMakePositionMtx with C code in ftparts.c.
Converted the former BSS byte array lbl_80459240 into a named struct instance ft_jobj_scale containing an Mtx, a has_z_scale bitfield, and trailing unknown bytes.
Moved lbl_804590D8 BSS storage out of ftparts.c and into asm/melee/ft/ftanim.s as a 0x168-byte .bss symbol.
Updated surviving assembly blocks in ftparts.c to reference ft_jobj_scale instead of lbl_80459240.
Changed HSD_JObjGetScaleZ in include/sysdolphin/baselib/jobj.h from returning jobj->scale.x to returning jobj->scale.z.
Removed local sdata2 constants lbl_804D82C8 and lbl_804D82CC in favor of literal 1.0F and 0.0F uses where shown in the remaining assembly annotation.

Added temporary static inline wrappers _HSD_JObjGetScaleX, _HSD_JObjGetScaleY, and _HSD_JObjGetScaleZ with explicit __assert calls and line numbers, annotated with a todo to remove them when strings can be reused.
smart_moves: Named the shared matrix/flag BSS region as ft_jobj_scale, making later assembly and C interactions easier to reason about without changing the underlying address-sensitive references.
Modeled byte offset 0x30 as a has_z_scale bitfield rather than leaving it as an unnamed flag in a raw byte array.
Preserved matching-sensitive assert strings and line numbers by introducing local _HSD_JObjGetScale* inline wrappers instead of directly using the public HSD_JObjGetScale* helpers.

Kept remaining unmatched functions as assembly while updating their symbol references to the newly named C object, allowing incremental decompilation without requiring the entire file to be converted at once.
Identified and fixed an apparent header bug where HSD_JObjGetScaleZ returned the X scale component.
decomp_lessons: When decompiling around shared BSS, replace raw label arrays with a minimally understood struct as soon as offsets reveal stable semantics, but preserve unknown padding fields until the full layout is known.
Bitfield naming can document flag semantics while still matching byte-level access patterns used by remaining assembly.

Temporary inline wrappers are useful when standard helpers would reuse different strings or emit different assert metadata, especially in functions where string pooling or assertion line numbers affect matching.
A single matched C function can require coordinated updates in still-assembly neighbors if they reference renamed globals.
Header cleanup can be part of decomp progress when a wrong inline accessor blocks correct C reconstruction or reveals a real semantic error.

naming_conventions.lesson: Use subsystem-prefixed names for file-level fighter globals once their role is known.
Name flags by observed behavior rather than preserving anonymous byte access.
Replace float labels with literals when evidence supports them and matching remains intact.
Underscored local wrappers can signal matching-only shims intended for later removal.

assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced a large asm block for Fighter_JObjMakePositionMtx with C while preserving calls to hsdJObj.make_pmtx, PSMTXScale, PSMTXConcat, and HSD_MtxInverse.
Used local variables scale_z, scale_y, and scale_x and a stack temp_mtx to express the same inverse-scale matrix sequence shown in the removed assembly.
Preserved exact assert behavior in scale getter wrappers using __assert(lbl_804D3A30, 875/888/901, lbl_804D3A38).
Updated assembly label references from lbl_80459240@ha/l to ft_jobj_scale@ha/l in multiple still-unmatched functions.
Represented the global matrix state as an Mtx plus flag so C and assembly could share the same storage layout.

review_feedback.author: AltimorTASDK
review_feedback.text: The diff got messed up because master didn't have make format run after the .clang-format changes.
review_feedback.impact: Explains noisy or misleading diff formatting context.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Some of the changes from this PR are now in #637 and we should merge that first.
review_feedback.impact: Merge ordering mattered because the PR overlapped with #637.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.impact: Follow-up maintenance was rebasing after related changes landed.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that remove the temporary _HSD_JObjGetScaleX/Y/Z wrappers after string reuse support improves.
Check PR #637 for overlapping ftparts.c or fighter naming changes referenced in the merge discussion.
Search for subsequent struct refinements to ft_jobj_scale and any replacement of unk_31 padding.
Audit remaining uses of HSD_JObjGetScaleZ to confirm the scale.z header fix did not require additional matching adjustments.
